transcript: This homeless man tried to crawl into a garbage can to take a nap. Instead, it was dumped into a garbage truck for shredding. And the unknowing sanitation worker started the machine in a hurry. The homeless man used his cell phone to call the emergency services. Emergency workers received the call, followed the address and caught up with the garbage truck. However, when they got into the car and were ready to search, they could not find the homeless man. That's when he realized he was chasing the wrong car and he was screwed. The homeless man was going to be crushed to pieces. Although Lisa found the garbage truck in a hurry and told the sanitation worker to turn off the machine. It was too late. The machine had been running for over an hour. I'm afraid the hobo's in a very bad way. They climbed on top of the truck and searched for him as the trash was thrown out, bag by bag. Finally, they find a foot at the entrance to the shredder. There was little hope for the hobo's survival. But when they opened the bag, they found the homeless man sleeping. The hobo was found to be in no danger of dying. The paramedics couldn't believe it. They couldn't believe how the machine hadn't crushed him under all that pressure. It turns out the homeless man hadn't been in the machine yet. Because there's a lot of garbage today. Before the machine had a chance to shred him, the driver turned it off. If it had been a second later, the hobo would have been reduced to powder. Although the man was saved.
